message:
fix(node): feature-gate optional modules and harden numeric inputs against NaN/Infinity

Two related improvements to the franken-node library crate:

Feature gating (Cargo.toml + lib.rs):
- Add "extended-surfaces" and "test-support" features to Cargo.toml
- Gate 10 modules behind cfg(feature = "extended-surfaces"): claims,
  conformance, encoding, extensions, federation, perf, registry,
  repair, sdk, verifier_economy — these are optional subsystems that
  downstream consumers (e.g. lightweight node binaries) may not need
- Gate testing module behind cfg(any(test, feature = "test-support"))
  so it's only compiled when running tests or explicitly opted-in
- Core modules (api, config, connector, control_plane, migration,
  observability, ops, policy, remote, replay, runtime, security,
  storage, supply_chain, tools) remain unconditionally compiled

NaN/Infinity input hardening across security modules:
- degraded_mode_policy.rs: RecoveryStatus::with_error_rate() rejects
  non-finite values (NaN/Inf) by skipping the assignment, keeping the
  field as None. Add 3 tests for NaN, Inf, and finite acceptance.

- dgis/update_copilot.rs: Guard against division-by-zero when factors
  map is empty in confidence calculation; use 0.5 fallback.

- sybil_defense.rs: TrustAggregator::new() replaces non-finite
  trim_ratio with 0.2 default. StakeWeighter::new() replaces non-finite
  base_weight/max_weight with 0.01/1.0 defaults. SybilDetector::new()
  replaces non-finite similarity_threshold with 0.95. Add 4 tests.

- vef_degraded_mode.rs: ProofLagSlo::new() replaces non-finite
  max_error_rate with 0.0 (fail-closed: any positive error rate
  breaches the SLO). Add 2 tests including breach verification.

- verifier_economy/mod.rs: compute_reputation() returns 0 when the
  weighted sum is non-finite (NaN or Inf dimension inputs). Add 2 tests.

All guards follow the same pattern: check is_finite(), fall back to a
safe default. This prevents NaN propagation through the security
decision pipeline where non-finite values could bypass threshold
comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+extended-surfaces = []
+test-support = []
+
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
